title: Solas SMP QOL Modpack
description: This modpack has been deprecated. Thank you everyone who has used and played this pack.
body:
This Modpack was created for the Solas Council SMP. It offers FPS boosts, controllor support and fun server side mods. This also includes Xearo's Map, and Open Party and Claims, for easy claim management on our SMP.

If there are any problems reach out to jojosolassupport, on discord!
